display.purpose: Hero gym name on top card. Proper nouns only. Always text-balance, tracking-tight.

headline.purpose: Compact gym card names, some dialog titles.

title.purpose: shadcn Card titles. Note medium weight, not bold — calm by default.

tier-label.purpose: Lowercase verdict word on tier badges. 'sending hot', not 'Sending Hot'. The voice in typography form.

body.purpose: Default body, table rows, helper copy. Cap line length 65–75ch in prose.

mono-numeric.purpose: Big number on tier badges. Tabular figures prevent jitter.

micro-label.purpose: Table column headers, structural badges. Uppercase, wide tracking.

shadows.name: sticker-edge-rest
shadows.purpose: Default flat colored stroke-shadow under any pressable surface. The 'sticker edge.'

shadows.name: sticker-edge-lifted
shadows.purpose: Hover/focus state. Paired with translateY(-2px) on the surface.

shadows.name: card-underglow
shadows.purpose: Soft ambient under cards. Always stacked with sticker-edge-rest, never alone.

shadows.name: tier-badge-hero
shadows.purpose: Deeper sticker edge under hero tier badges. UNKNOWN tier omits this entirely.

shadows.name: dialog-overlay
shadows.purpose: The only sanctioned glassmorphism. Page-behind blur for modals.

motion.name: lift-on-press
motion.purpose: The signature button interaction. Combined with the sticker-edge shadow scaling, surfaces appear to lift off and press into the page.

motion.name: badge-bob
motion.value: @keyframes badge-bob { 0%,100% { transform: rotate(var(--rot, 0deg)) translateY(0); } 50% { transform: rotate(var(--rot, 0deg)) translateY(-3px); } } 3.6s ease-in-out infinite, motion-safe only
motion.purpose: Hero tier badge bobs to celebrate the top recommendation. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: pop-in
motion.value: @keyframes pop-in { 0% { transform: scale(0.6); opacity: 0; } 60% { transform: scale(1.08); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: scale(1); } }
motion.purpose: Entrance animation. Overshoots to 1.08 and settles — playful but quick.

motion.name: card-expand
motion.value: transition-[height] duration-300 ease-out, interpolate-size: allow-keywords, h-0 -> h-auto
motion.purpose: Reset-detail accordion under each GymCard. Uses interpolate-size for height auto transition.

radii.philosophy: Base radius is 0.875rem, scaled by 0.6 / 0.8 / 1.0 / 1.4 / 1.8 / 2.2 / 2.6 for sm / md / lg / xl / 2xl / 3xl / 4xl. Always paired with the squircle-* utility (corner-shape: squircle in supporting browsers, regular border-radius fallback elsewhere).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The signature action control. Lifts on hover/focus, presses on active, with a stacked drop shadow that acts as a 'sticker edge.'
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 10px; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-background, oklch(0.99 0.004 90)); background: var(--color-brand, oklch(55.4% 0.046 257.417)); border: 1px solid var(--color-brand-shadow, oklch(37.2% 0.044 257.287)); border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 var(--color-brand-shadow, oklch(37.2% 0.044 257.287)); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover, .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 var(--color-brand-shadow, oklch(37.2% 0.044 257.287)); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 0 var(--color-brand-shadow, oklch(37.2% 0.044 257.287)); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Quiet secondary action with the same lift mechanic.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 10px; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.36 0.02 270); background: oklch(0.99 0.004 90); border: 1px solid oklch(37.2% 0.044 257.287); border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 oklch(37.2% 0.044 257.287); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover, .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 0 0 oklch(37.2% 0.044 257.287); outline: none; } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 0 oklch(37.2% 0.044 257.287); }

components.name: Sending Hot Tier Badge
components.description: The signature visual: a tilted, color-coded 'sticker' announcing the gym's freshness verdict. Hero variant bobs gently.
components.html:
🔥
sending hot
3fresh sectors
components.css: .ds-tier-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 12px 10px 10px; border: 2px solid; border-radius: 30.8px; transform: rotate(var(--rot, 0deg)); font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; user-select: none; } .ds-tier-hot { background: oklch(0.93 0.08 30); color: oklch(0.38 0.18 30); border-color: oklch(0.55 0.20 30); box-shadow: 0 3px 0 0 oklch(0.55 0.20 30); } .ds-tier-emoji { font-size: 24px; line-height: 1; } .ds-tier-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-tier-label { font-weight: 800; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.015em; text-transform: lowercase; } .ds-tier-count { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 4px; } .ds-tier-num { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-tier-desc { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Unknown Tier Badge
components.description: The honest 'no data' variant. Dashed border, no stacked shadow — uncertainty has no weight.
components.html:
❓
no data yet
—
components.css: .ds-tier-unknown { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.5 0 0); border: 2px dashed oklch(0.78 0 0); box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Gym Card
components.description: The domain card. Warm tier-tinted surface, Pressed-Sticker stacked shadow, large squircle radius.
components.html:
The Spot

3 sectors reset since you were last there.
components.css: .ds-gym-card { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 16px; background: var(--surface-tint); border: 2px solid var(--surface-stroke); border-radius: 30.8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 var(--surface-stroke), 0 12px 32px -12px var(--surface-shadow); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; min-height: 176px; } .ds-gym-header { display: flex; align-items: start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; } .ds-gym-title { font-family: 'Baloo 2', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 36px); line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: oklch(0.18 0.02 270); margin: 0; text-wrap: balance; } .ds-gym-body { margin-top: 12px; font-size: 14px; color: oklch(0.45 0.02 270); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Surfaces you write on — no lift mechanic, halo focus only.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: oklch(0.18 0.02 270); background: oklch(0.99 0.004 90); border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.015 90); border-radius: 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.45 0.02 270); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.45 0.02 270); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.45 0.02 270 / 0.5); } @media (min-width: 768px) { .ds-input { font-size: 14px; } }

components.name: Success Badge
components.description: Status pill — quiet sage tint for approved/synced/ok states.
components.css: .ds-badge-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.45 0.13 145); background: oklch(0.97 0.04 145); border: 1px solid oklch(0.55 0.13 145 / 0.2); border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Brand Badge
components.description: Structural marker — wide tracking, heavy weight, used for context labels like 'BRATISLAVA' or 'BETA'.
components.css: .ds-brand-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: oklch(0.18 0.02 270); background: oklch(0.99 0.004 90); border: 2px solid oklch(0.18 0.02 270 / 0.8); border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Status Dot
components.description: Tiny inline pip in the reset table. Fresh-since-visit = filled emerald; already climbed = outline ring; no data = small muted dot.
components.css: .ds-status-fresh, .ds-status-stale, .ds-status-none { display: inline-block; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-status-fresh { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: oklch(0.7 0.18 152); } .ds-status-stale { width: 6px; height: 6px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.45 0.02 270 / 0.5); } .ds-status-none { width: 4px; height: 4px; background: oklch(0.45 0.02 270 / 0.3); }

components.name: Drawer Handle
components.description: The grab affordance at the top of the Vaul bottom-sheet drawer. A muted pill that screams 'pull me.'
components.css: .ds-drawer-sheet { background: oklch(0.99 0.004 90); border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.015 90); border-top-left-radius: 30.8px; border-top-right-radius: 30.8px; padding-bottom: 24px; } .ds-drawer-handle { width: 100px; height: 8px; margin: 16px auto 0; background: oklch(0.95 0.012 90); border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-drawer-content { padding: 16px; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.18 0.02 270); }

narrative.overview: Fresh Holds looks like a friendly bulletin board for a local gym. The screen is a soft off-white card stock, dotted with a faint pinpoint pattern, onto which the day's gym recommendations are stuck like five colorful, slightly-rotated stickers. Each sticker (the tier badge) wears its mood plainly: an emoji, a casual climber phrase ('sending hot', 'slim pickings'), and a stacked drop shadow that pretends to be a die-cut edge. Hover any control and it lifts a single pixel off the board. Press it and it presses back in. The voice is climber-native and casual. The product is a verdict, not a dashboard, so the loudest element on any screen is the tier label in lowercase extra-bold. Numbers are intentionally smaller and monospace-tabular, in the role of supporting evidence. Cards lean on warm tinted surfaces, a 2px colored stroke-shadow that reads as a pressed sticker edge, and a soft deep ambient shadow underneath.
keyCharacteristics: A small palette of warm neutrals on a 0.99-lightness off-white, with five tier color systems (coral, amber, sage, lavender-slate, unknown-cloud) carrying the product's main signal.
Pressed-sticker depth: every surface has a flat 2px colored stroke-shadow plus a soft 0 12px 32px -12px ambient shadow underneath. No raised drop-shadows, no glassmorphism except the dialog overlay.
Squircle corners everywhere via the custom squircle-* utilities, graded across 7 steps from sm to 4xl.
Tilted, bobbing tier badges in the -2°/+1.5°/-1°/+2°/-1.5° range. Hero badges animate with the badge-bob keyframe under motion-safe.
Heading typography in Baloo 2 (font-heading), bold and tightly tracked. Body in Geist; numerics in Geist Mono with tabular figures.
Tier color is never carried alone: every tier also has a unique emoji, a unique label phrase, and a unique rotation. Color-blind safe by structural redundancy, not by accident.

rules.name: The Five-Sticker Rule
rules.body: Only the five tier palettes carry product meaning. New colors do not get added to communicate state — extend the tier semantic instead. If a state doesn't map to a tier, it doesn't deserve a hue: use muted neutrals plus an icon or label.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Anything Rule
rules.body: No #000, no #fff, no flat greys. Every neutral is tinted toward the warm off-white hue (chroma 0.002–0.015) so the page reads as paper, not screen. The dot-pattern background reinforces this.

rules.name: The Color-Plus-Shape Rule
rules.body: No tier is communicated by hue alone. Every tier carries an emoji, a label phrase, a rotation, and (except UNKNOWN) a colored stroke. Color blindness must not erase the verdict.

rules.name: The Lowercase Verdict Rule
rules.body: Tier labels are lowercase. Always. 'sending hot', not 'Sending Hot', and definitely not 'SENDING HOT'. The lowercase is the climber-native voice in typography form.

rules.name: The Verdict-Loudest Rule
rules.body: On any surface that carries a tier, the tier label is the largest semantic element. Numeric scores, dates, and counts are smaller and quieter. The product translates math into a verdict; typography enforces it.

rules.name: The Heading-Belongs-To-Names Rule
rules.body: font-heading (Baloo 2) is reserved for proper nouns and tier titles — gym names, dialog titles, card titles. UI labels, table headers, button text, and helper copy stay in Geist.

rules.name: The Pressed-Sticker Rule
rules.body: Surfaces sit on the page. They do not float above it. Drop shadows of the form 0 N px Mpx rgba(0,0,0,…) (the SaaS hover-card shadow) are forbidden. If you need depth, use the Sticker Edge + Card Underglow combination.

rules.name: The Lift-Don't-Glow Rule
rules.body: Hover state moves the surface (translateY + deeper edge), never adds a glow or a halo. Focus state does the same. The motion is the affordance; color halos are not the system's language.

rules.name: The Unknown-Is-Dashed Rule
rules.body: When the system genuinely doesn't know, the visual language must show it. No solid stroke, no stacked shadow — a dashed border and a flat surface. Confidence has weight; uncertainty has none.

dos: Do use the Sticker Edge + Underglow combination (box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 var(--surface-stroke), 0 12px 32px -12px var(--surface-shadow)) on any new card or elevated surface.
Do tilt and bob tier badges when introducing a new tier or tier-adjacent badge. The rotation is part of the language — don't render them straight.
Do reach for font-heading (Baloo 2) only on proper nouns and verdicts, not on UI labels or helper copy.
Do wire tier color via the tier-bg / tier-fg / tier-ring token triplet from src/lib/tier.ts. Never hand-pick a new tier hue at the component level.
Do show uncertainty as the dashed border + flat surface (the UNKNOWN tier treatment) — make the absence of confidence look like an intentional absence.
Do prefer the squircle-* utilities over default rounded-* everywhere. Both must always be present together: squircle-3xl rounded-2xl, never one without the other.
Do keep tier labels lowercase, in font-extrabold (Geist 800), with the climber-native phrasing. No title case, no all caps.
donts: Don't render a Generic SaaS dashboard. No hero-metric cards, no gradient text, no background-clip: text accents, no faux-glass cards. Fresh Holds is not Mixpanel.
Don't render a Fitness-app aesthetic. No neon gradients, no athletic stock imagery, no gamified XP bars, no streaks/levels. This is not Strava.
Don't render an Outdoorsy-brand template. No kraft paper, no earth-tone moss/clay/rust palette, no rugged sans-serif + slab pairing. This is not Patagonia.
Don't render Corporate utility. No Material/iOS-HIG default radii, no platform-default greys, no anonymous filled buttons.
Don't use #000, #fff, or flat untinted greys. Every neutral is tinted toward the warm off-white hue.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as a colored accent). Use full borders, surface tints, or the tier system.
Don't use gradient text. Solid colors only; emphasis comes from weight and size.
Don't use glassmorphism on cards. The dialog overlay is the only backdrop-blur in the system.
Don't introduce a new semantic color outside the five tiers + destructive + success. If a state matters, map it to an existing tier; if it doesn't fit, use muted neutrals with a label.
Don't make tier badges work as color-only signals. Always pair color with the tier's emoji and lowercase label phrase.
Don't replace the Pressed-Sticker shadow with a generic drop-shadow. No shadow-md, no shadow-lg on product surfaces (the only exception is shadow-lg on the modal dialog).
Don't capitalize verdict words or restate them in title case. The lowercase is the voice.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy. Commas, colons, periods, parentheses. Also not --.
